summary: God's love for the world is shown through the sending of his Son so that those who believe may receive eternal life.
The Son's mission was to save rather than to condemn, and one's response to him determines one's standing before God.
Light and darkness serve as moral metaphors: those who live by truth welcome the light, while those who do evil avoid it.

citations.quoted_text: not to judge the world, but to save the world
light is come into the world
